authorization_phrase: Authorize s15-d1 cross-sector cash-equity z-score exit-to-mean Tier-N spec DRAFT only — bound by DR10 v2.
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts: inherited by-reference from cross-sector lineage; cash-equity adaptations (C5 split_only documented+applied; C3 extended-hours NOT_APPLICABLE daily; C4 US equity RTH); to be instantiated at P2
c6_inherited_constraints_forming: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 reachable on the cross-sector basket (expected ~60-105/y basket-summed). If observed effective IS rate < 25/y basket-summed, OOS K9 unreachability becomes structurally probable -> PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE per precedent. The chain shall NOT relax K9 at OOS.

EXIT/STOP-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING; NEW central thesis): the exit is EXIT-TO-MEAN (close on re-cross of SMA_L; the reversion target itself) and the stop is a vol-scaled catastrophe brake (S*sigma, S~3.5; NOT a fixed 2N). This design is the candidate's entire reason to exist after s14-d1-cross-sector FAIL_SAFETY (LESSON_S14_D1_002/003); it is a hypothesis to TEST at P6 IS, never assumed.
DA3=B (BINDING): per-trade risk pct = 0.005 (0.5%); carried as proven-safe sizing
DA4=B: START_CASH_USD = 100000 ($100k); DR10 v2 cost_drag clears strong margin for cash equity
exit/stop-first-principles + K9-reachability + DR10-v2-reachability disciplines applied at PLAN+DRAFT; binding for all subsequent phases
K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades_basket_summed >= 100; no relaxation at any phase
Mechanic family z-score/Bollinger mean-reversion exit-to-mean (NON-RSI) LOCKED at PLAN

z-score params lookback L=20 + entry band k=2.0 first-principles (Bollinger standard, NOT optimized); exit-to-mean + catastrophe stop S~3.5 + time-stop M=10 to be JUSTIFIED (not tuned) and LOCKED at SEAL
DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-reference to framework SEAL 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50 turnover / 0.05 cost_drag immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal
split_only adjustment convention CONFIRMED (DA15); reuse same DR9-passed CSVs; switching/mixing post-SEAL FORBIDDEN
Cross-sector universe {AAPL (Tech), JPM (Financials), XOM (Energy)} LOCKED at PLAN; held constant from s14-d1-cross-sector to isolate the exit/stop variable; widening/substitution post-SEAL FORBIDDEN
DR9 data-availability gate PASSED all 3 symbols by REUSE (sealed b13af03; result_seal a8ff9126...); data provenance locked; NO fresh fetch

A7 effective_independent_bets + K10 avg_pairwise_correlation + K6 dispersion LOAD-BEARING but NOT the candidate's risk axis (already measured in-band for this universe at s14-d1-cross-sector); the risk axis is per-trade edge under the new exit/stop design
s14-d1-cross-sector lifecycle terminal (FAIL_SAFETY; P7 6485ea9) preserved verbatim; this candidate is FRESH, NOT a _revN_/patch; clears T-FORBID-13/14/15
no_strategy_optimization_authorized: parameters are first-principles proposals to justify at SEAL, not grid-searched
P6 IS PASS (if reached) does NOT imply READY at OOS; P6 PASS NEVER implies live-readiness; 6-gate live-block applies regardless of any verdict; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE permanent

cost_surface_proposed_at_draft_locked_at.note: Identical cost surface to s14-d1-cross-sector (same universe/data); per-share commission tiny fraction of notional; exact constants locked at SEAL

da_register.name: mechanic_family
da_register.resolution: F-new: z-score / Bollinger-band mean-reversion with exit-to-mean (NON-RSI)

da_register.name: entry_band_k_sigma
da_register.resolution: 2.0 (Bollinger standard 2-sigma; entry long z<=-2.0, short z>=+2.0; first-principles, NOT optimized)

da_register.name: exit_rule_EXIT_TO_MEAN
da_register.resolution: EXIT-TO-MEAN: close long when close>=SMA_L (midline); close short when close<=SMA_L. The exit IS the reversion target. [LOAD-BEARING new binding axis]

da_register.name: catastrophe_stop_vol_scaled
da_register.resolution: entry -/+ S*sigma_L, S=3.5 (vol-scaled disaster brake; wider than k=2.0 entry band; NOT a fixed 2N ATR). [LOAD-BEARING new binding axis]

da_register.name: time_stop_max_hold_bars
da_register.resolution: M = 10 bars (fallback if mean not recovered within reversion horizon; first-principles, NOT tuned)

da_register.name: sizing_method_vol_normalized
da_register.resolution: shares = floor((0.005*equity) / (S*sigma_L)); per-trade dollar risk constant; keyed to the catastrophe-stop distance

da_register.name: DR10_definition
da_register.resolution: v2 AND-conjunction (annual_turnover>0.50 AND S2_cost_drag>0.05); thresholds byte-equivalent

da_register.name: DR9_data_continuity
da_register.resolution: ALREADY PASSED all 3 (AAPL/JPM/XOM) — REUSE of sealed CSVs at b13af03 (result_seal a8ff9126...); NO fresh fetch; sha-verified at BUILD

da_register.name: adjustment_convention
da_register.resolution: split_only (CONFIRMED; reuse same CSVs; AAPL 2020-08-31 4:1 already applied+verified; JPM/XOM no splits; dividends not adjusted)

da_register.name: data_vendor
da_register.resolution: tiingo (data already fetched + sealed; no new fetch)

da_register.name: universe
da_register.resolution: {AAPL (Tech), JPM (Financials), XOM (Energy)} — held constant from s14-d1-cross-sector to ISOLATE the exit/stop variable

da_register.name: portfolio_position_caps
da_register.resolution: max_positions_per_name=1, max_total_positions=3, no inter-name coordination, no pyramid

da_register.name: warmup_days
da_register.resolution: 30 (covers lookback L=20 + margin) — CONFIRM AT SEAL

diversification_metrics_load_bearing_but.A7_effective_independent_bets: expected ~2.09 (same universe as s14-d1-cross-sector; already measured in-band)
diversification_metrics_load_bearing_but.note: Diversification was NOT the s14-d1 failure (A7/K10 in band); held constant; not this candidate's risk axis

dr_register.DR10_v2: turnover_cost_explosion (annual_turnover>0.50 AND S2_cost_drag>0.05) -> REJECT_FAST. AND-conjunction (78cd22e). Cash-equity cost_drag CLEARS strong margin
dr_register.DR11: NOT IN CHAIN — cash equity unlevered

first_principles_burden.vs_all_tech_sibling_draft_214bae0: different mechanic family; all-tech DRAFT preserved byte-stable; not advanced (shares the failed RSI(3)+2N mechanic)
first_principles_burden.vs_s14_d1_cross_sector_terminal: NON-RSI mechanic family (z-score vs RSI(3)); exit-to-mean vs RSI-threshold exit; vol-scaled catastrophe stop vs fixed 2N. Universe held constant DELIBERATELY to isolate the exit/stop variable. Clears T-FORBID-13/14/15. NOT a _revN_/patch. s14-d1-cross-sector chain preserved terminal/byte-stable.
first_principles_burden.vs_s9_s7_d1: single-name cross-sector basket, non-RSI z-score mean-reversion bi-directional; s7-D1 concentration lesson already addressed by measured-balanced cross-sector basket

first_principles_exit_stop_edge_design.exit_design: EXIT-TO-MEAN: close when price re-crosses the rolling mean (SMA_L midline). The exit IS the mean-reversion thesis target, not an arbitrary oscillator level; captures the full reversion the entry predicted.
first_principles_exit_stop_edge_design.expected_effect_HYPOTHESIS_NOT_CLAIM: avg_win up (thesis-aligned exit-to-mean capture) and stop-frequency down (3.5-sigma vs 2N), moving profit/loss ratio toward/above 1. To be TESTED at P6 IS; not asserted.
first_principles_exit_stop_edge_design.rationale: Per LESSON_S14_D1_002/003 + selection plan 89d6838, exit/stop edge design is the binding axis: s14-d1-cross-sector cleared DR10-v2/K9/DR9/A7/K10 yet failed FAIL_SAFETY on per-trade edge because an RSI-mid exit (small winners) + fixed 2N hard stop (large losers) gave profit/loss<1 despite 54.31% win rate.
first_principles_exit_stop_edge_design.sizing: vol-normalized: shares=floor(risk$/(S*sigma_L)); per-trade dollar risk constant and consistent with the catastrophe-stop distance.
first_principles_exit_stop_edge_design.stop_design: Vol-scaled catastrophe brake: entry -/+ S*sigma_L, S~3.5 (wider than the k=2.0 entry band by ~1.5 sigma). A disaster brake for a broken thesis, NOT a primary exit; scales with volatility so it does not truncate normal reversion in any regime. NOT a fixed 2N ATR.
first_principles_exit_stop_edge_design.time_stop: max-hold M~10 bars fallback; mean-reversion should resolve within a bounded horizon.

k9_reachability_table_draft.k9_binding_low_note: K9 is NOT the binding low for this candidate; the binding axis is exit/stop edge design (the new K1/K2 risk)
k9_reachability_table_draft.rec1_equivalent_disclosure: If observed effective IS rate < 25/y basket-summed -> OOS K9 unreachability probable -> PARK. Expected 60-105/y comfortably exceeds floor.

k_gates.K10_avg_pairwise_corr: APPLICABLE; expected ~0.45 (same universe as s14-d1-cross-sector); LOAD-BEARING
k_gates.K12_DR_fires_on_cost_stress: if DR2/DR3/DR4/DR5 fires across S0/S2/S3/S4 -> FAIL_SAFETY
k_gates.K1_sharpe_proxy_lt_0: FAIL_SAFETY at S1 (the gate s14-d1-cross-sector failed; this candidate's exit/stop redesign targets clearing it)
